outputs.description: Function that calculates count from a MetricsPipe

Count.description: Count the number of non-null entries in a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates sum from a MetricsPipe

Sum.description: Calculate the sum of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates maximum from a MetricsPipe

Max.description: Calculate the maximum value of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates minimum from a MetricsPipe

Min.description: Calculate the minimum value of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates ratio from a MetricsPipe

Ratio.description: Calculate the ratio of sums of two columns

outputs.description: Function that calculates dot product from a MetricsPipe

Dot.description: Calculate the dot product between two columns

outputs.description: Function that retrieves the nth value from a MetricsPipe

Nth.description: Get the nth value of a column after sorting by another column

outputs.description: Function that calculates variance from a MetricsPipe

Variance.description: Calculate the variance of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates standard deviation from a MetricsPipe

StandardDeviation.description: Calculate the standard deviation of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates coefficient of variation from a MetricsPipe

CV.description: Calculate the coefficient of variation of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates correlation from a MetricsPipe

Correlation.description: Calculate the Pearson correlation between two columns

outputs.description: Function that calculates covariance from a MetricsPipe

Cov.description: Calculate the covariance between two columns

outputs.description: Function that calculates mean from a MetricsPipe

Mean.description: Calculate the mean of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates median from a MetricsPipe

Median.description: Calculate the median of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates percentile from a MetricsPipe

Percentile.description: Calculate the specified percentile of a column

outputs.description: Function that creates a pivot table from a MetricsPipe

PivotTable.description: Create a pivot table from the data

outputs.description: Function that groups data from a MetricsPipe

GroupBy.description: Group the data and apply aggregation functions

outputs.description: Function that filters data from a MetricsPipe

Filter.description: Filter the dataframe based on a condition

outputs.description: Function that calculates cumulative sum from a MetricsPipe

CumulativeSum.description: Calculate the cumulative sum of a column

outputs.description: Function that calculates rolling metric from a MetricsPipe

RollingMetric.description: Calculate a rolling metric on a column

outputs.description: Dictionary of all calculated metrics

Execute.description: Execute the pipeline and return all calculated metrics

outputs.description: Pivot table from the MetricsPipe

ShowPivot.description: Show a specific pivot table or the last created one

outputs.description: Current dataframe from the MetricsPipe
